perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man and a woman wearing white 'haha baby' T-shirts stand in a parking lot, talking animatedly; the man makes exaggerated sad facial expressions. (2) Transition to South Korea; the woman, now in a grey plaid school uniform, meets a tall, handsome Korean man in a tan uniform jacket and school attire. (3) The pair pose for photos in a studio, then walk together on a busy city street, holding hands; the woman exhibits shy smiles and excited gestures. (4) They stand against a red brick wall where the man performs a 'kabedon' (leaning his arm against the wall close to her face) while looking into her eyes. (5) The woman and several other female friends squeeze into a photo booth with the Korean man, posing with hand hearts and V-signs. (6) The video ends with a POV shot of the man holding out a beverage and smiling warmly toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, comedic background music plays alongside a loud, high-energy dialogue in Mandarin between a man and a woman. (2) The music transitions into a soft, romantic K-pop style ballad as the setting changes to Korea. (3) The woman's voice is frequently heard laughing, squealing in excitement, and speaking in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (4) Occasional Korean phrases are heard from the male companion, mixed with ambient street noises of pedestrians and traffic. (5) The romantic music swells during the wall-lean scene, followed by the sound of a camera shutter effect and group chatter in the photo booth.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '老闆娘要去韓國拍片' (The boss's wife is going to Korea to film). (2) Hook text: '男朋友來了!!' (Boyfriend is here!!) and '直接牽起來了!!' (Directly holding hands!!), conveying romantic excitement. (3) Descriptive text: '摸頭誰扛得住' (Who can handle a head rub) and '突然的進攻!!' (Sudden attack!!), emphasizing romantic tropes. (4) Functional/Hook text: '請救救佩潔心臟' (Please save Pei Jie's heart) and '第一視角體驗時間' (First-person perspective experience time).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro setting the premise -> Montage of romantic dating activities in Korea -> Closing POV experience.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male and 1 female in intro; 1 main female creator and 1 main Korean male actor; 2 additional females in the photo booth scene; occasional male passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A Taiwanese female creator in a Korean school uniform and a tall, stylish Korean male actor also in school-style uniform.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Parking lot in Taiwan, followed by street scenes in Seoul (Hongdae/Insa-dong style), a studio with pink accents, and a red brick wall with autumn trees.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight and bright indoor studio lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Shift -> Experience Sequence -> POV Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain viewers by showcasing a 'dream date' experience in Korea with a handsome actor, effectively using romantic K-drama tropes (holding hands, school uniforms, 'kabedon') to engage the audience. It also serves as brand exposure for 'haha baby' through the prominently worn T-shirts in the intro.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The main characters wear 'haha baby' branded T-shirts during the introduction, and the content is framed as a special production for the brand's owners.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic female narration and comedic interaction with the husband/boss in the intro.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leans heavily into 'Oppaa' culture and K-drama romantic fantasies to appeal to a female demographic.
